admission_type: restricted access – verification of requirements and personal preparation
admission_test_type: Verification of curricular requirements and personal preparation; separate Italian and English curriculum tracks
application_platform: MoveIN platform for non-EU pre-selection; Infostud for admission
application_round: September intake; also potentially February intake [uncertain]
intake_semester_availability: [uncertain] – second semester February intake referenced in search results

academic_requirements.prior_degree: A three-year bachelor's degree, preferably in Economics, Management, Business Administration, or related field

language_requirements.level: B2 CEFR in English (for English curriculum track)
language_requirements.note: Programme has separate Italian and English curriculum tracks. Applicants to the English track must demonstrate B2 English. Double-degree option with Hochschule der Wirtschaft für Management – Mannheim (Germany) is available.

italian_language_requirement: Programme is bilingual; Italian curriculum available alongside English curriculum. Students in the English track may still encounter Italian in university administration.
application_deadline_eu: 31 July 2026 for EU and EU-equivalent candidates [uncertain]; second semester (February) applications may have different deadlines
application_deadline_non_eu: MoveIN pre-selection window 22 December 2025 – 15 May 2026 for non-EU candidates residing abroad (September intake)
application_fee: €30 per application via MoveIN (max 2 per candidate)
required_documents: Bachelor's degree certificate or enrolment certificate
For foreign qualifications: Declaration of Value (DoV) or CIMEA statement
document_translation_authentication: Foreign documents require official translation and legalization/apostille plus Declaration of Value (DoV) or CIMEA statement.

entry_exam_or_test.selection: Verification of curricular requirements and personal preparation
